lesson.menu_desc: May I speak with...? & phone phrases -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 11 -- Phone Calls -- Speaking with Confidence
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Karina Macedo | Aula 11 -- Phone Calls: Speaking with Confidence

listenings.text: Hello, this is Karina Macedo speaking. I am calling for Robert. I am sorry, I cannot reach you now, so I am leaving a short message. I would like to confirm our meeting on Tuesday at ten. Please call me back on this number when you are free. You can also leave a message on my voicemail. Thank you very much. Have a good day. Goodbye.

Hello Karina, this is Robert speaking. Thank you for your call and your message. Yes, our meeting on Tuesday at ten is perfect for me. I am sorry I was not at my desk this morning. If you call again, please hold for one moment and my assistant can help you. You can also reach me on my mobile phone. The line is sometimes busy before lunch, so please try in the afternoon. See you on Tuesday. Goodbye.

extra_audio.text: First, Karina picked up the phone and called Robert. Then she said hello and asked to speak with him. Next, Robert answered and they talked for a moment. After that, Karina confirmed the meeting on Tuesday at ten. Finally, she said thank you and goodbye, and ended the call.
